message:
refactor: code quality pass — fix children() bug, deduplicate, harden dist

- Fix SgNode.children()/namedChildren() not propagating _compile (pattern
  cache lost on child nodes)
- Fix findAll() using direct SgNode construction instead of _makeNode()
- Remove duplicate LANG_MAP from encoder.ts (use langToInt from types.ts)
- Consolidate relational node encoding (inside/has/follows/precedes)
- Extract readResultJson() shared helper in ts/index.ts
- Merge duplicated long/short flag parsing in cli.ts
- Add dist export + functional tests for trace/traceFile/rewriteSource
- Update package.json description and keywords for new positioning
- Add build:js clean step to prevent stale chunk accumulation
- Extract shared bench utilities into bench/utils.ts

files.patch:
@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 {
   "name": "codesift",
   "version": "0.1.0",
-  "description": "Embeddable WASM-based structural code pattern matcher for JS/TS",
+  "description": "Structural code analysis + behavioral tracing in a single WASM module",
   "type": "module",
   "main": "dist/index.js",
   "module": "dist/index.js",
@@ -46,7 +46,7 @@
     "build:zig": "zig build -Doptimize=ReleaseSmall",
     "build:opt": "wasm-opt -Oz --strip-producers --strip-target-features dist/engine.wasm -o dist/engine.wasm --enable-bulk-memory --enable-sign-ext --enable-mutable-globals || echo 'wasm-opt not found, skipping optimization'",
     "build:embed": "node scripts/embed-wasm.mjs",
-    "build:js": "bun build src/js/index.ts src/js/cli.ts src/js/types.ts src/js/encoder.ts --outdir dist --target node --format esm --minify --sourcemap=external --splitting && bun x tsc --emitDeclarationOnly",
+    "build:js": "rm -f dist/*.js dist/*.js.map dist/*.d.ts dist/*.d.ts.map dist/ts/*.d.ts dist/ts/*.d.ts.map && bun build src/js/index.ts src/js/cli.ts src/js/types.ts src/js/encoder.ts --outdir dist --target node --format esm --minify --sourcemap=external --splitting && bun x tsc --emitDeclarationOnly",
     "build": "bun run build:zig && bun run build:opt && bun run build:embed && bun run build:js",
     "bench": "bun bench/index.ts",
     "bench:compare": "bun bench/compare.ts",
@@ -58,6 +58,10 @@
     "ast",
     "pattern-matching",
     "static-analysis",
+    "behavioral-analysis",
+    "trace",
+    "security",
+    "code-review",
     "linter",
     "wasm",
     "javascript",
